pre_expr:
fun s => getBalance s toResource ammReserveActor ≥ amountOut ∧
             fromResource ≠ toResource ∧
             amountIn > 0
intent: Mirror an L1 constant-product AMM swap onto L2 by adjusting the AMM-reserve actor's balances.  The bridge actor signs this action in response to an L1 `AmmSwapExecuted` event.  `ammReserveActor` receives `amountIn` of `fromResource` and sends `amountOut` of `toResource`.
impl_block:
fun s =>
      let s1 := setBalance s fromResource ammReserveActor
                  (getBalance s fromResource ammReserveActor + amountIn)
      let s2 := setBalance s1 toResource ammReserveActor
                  (getBalance s1 toResource ammReserveActor - amountOut)
      s2
